meaning: n.设阱捕兽者,[矿]矿井风门开关管理员
examples: Then Clarence Birdseye, an American fur-trapper turned inventor, developed a system for freezing fish.
Replaced one Troll Trapper with an equal level Ogre to the all troll trapper green camp next to each start location.
For the past 34 years, he has been the best trapper in the area.
But when you went back-to-school shopping, I'm going to guess you didn't buy a Trapper Keeper.
If you had a Trapper Keeper, you were fodder for John Hughes' next teenage drama.
